title: Open Cloze: The First Olympic Games

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text: The Olympic Games began 1.1. _________ ago in ancient Greece, around the year 776 BC. They were held 1.2. _________ honour of Zeus, the king of the Greek gods. 1.3. _________ the beginning, there was only one event: a short running race. Over time, 1.4. _________ sports were added, such as wrestling, boxing and chariot racing. Only free Greek men were allowed 1.5. _________ take part, and women could not 1.6. _________ watch the games. The winners did not receive medals 1.7. _________ athletes do today; instead, they were given a crown of olive leaves. Winning was 1.8. _________ a great honour that statues were sometimes built of the champions. The ancient games continued 1.9. _________ more than a thousand years. The modern Olympics, 1.10. _________ we know them now, were revived in 1896.
